original text:
Wash your tatties and cut into orange segments. not peel them the skin full nutritious goodness.
Put them bowl and slather them with dark soy sauce. Leave them for while, stirring occasionally.
Place them baking tray, skin down, with shallots and garlic cloves they need bit olive oil.
Roast until they are nicely cooked. They will brown and crisp with fluffy interiors bit like me.

Microsoft Virtual Academy free access training portal site from Microsoft, that focused helping those easily learn about Microsoft technologies. consist several courses you can study your own pace. The courses are worth determined amount points depending their depth level. The MVA site turn works points based system and scoreboard way encouragement and way rank you the site.
Bronze: 370 points.
Silver: 371 699 points.
Gold: 700 999 points.
Platinum: 1000 points more.
Beyond the points and scoreboard within the MVA community. Finishing courses and getting points get anyone enrolled the MVA discounts for Microsoft and access special Microsoft promotions related Microsoft technologies with courses the MVA.
The Microsoft Virtual Academy free for anyone wanting enroll in, the only thing needed Live and being interested specific course.
The Microsoft Virtual Academy site itself very well laid out and something worth pointing out, happens sport Metro UI-UX styled design. Something that looks spreading over all Microsoft web properties now. And must say works very well make things fluid and pleasant.
For further questions about the MVA, the site got fairly clear F.A.Q page you can take look at.
Microsoft Virtual Academy results very interesting hybrid e-learning portal and promotional vehicle from Microsoft its main function beyond promoting Microsoft Tech help easier follow and use learning aid for those interested Microsoft But that thanks being well balanced, works pretty well.
Separated less than month from the release Flash 10.2, new Adobe AIR update now out and while not major release itself, what should have also been released with Adobe AIR 2.5. fact Adobe AIR 2.6 got released broken several releases; From the release AIR 2.6 for Android that was released advance both the Desktop SDK and Runtime Adobe AIR 2.6, and course the actual update for currently installed Adobe AIR runtimes that just went live last week.
The reason for the advanced release AIR 2.6 for Android had all with Adobe’s strategic partnership with Google, Adobe needed and more than likely was demanded for this release AIR spice Google’s own release Android 3.0 A.K.A Honeycomb and Android 3.0 based slates like the Motorola XOOM. This way AIR for Android could then fully support the Content Viewer for Android and Adobe’s new Digital Publishing Suite.
Adobe AIR 2.6 all about pushing forward the dream Adobe Multiscreen and with good performance. Reason why guess all that AIR 2.6 could not had been released with AIR 2.6 Flash 10.2 advancements were integral realizing this.
With AIR 2.6, Adobe goes back truly supporting iOS the SDK, and they are going back iOS with vengeance, they are now offering end end solution akin what Novell’s MonoTouch does for iOS. Giving Flash, Flex and WebStack devs the comfort developing the way they know they are faster with. Leaving the AIR for iOS solution integrate the developed code native iOS App via the “new” AIR Developer Tool instead the Packager for iPhone; Native iOS apps with the RIAness Adobe but without sacrificing performance anymore.
AIR 2.6 starts truly delivering Adobe AIR MultiScreen solution. the same way you can say Microsoft working making Silverlight run everywhere. AIR 2.6 actually puts Adobe once again completely the lead, making possible deliver RIA apps that run the Desktop (Win, Linux), the Web (Via the Flash plugin) and two mobile platforms (Android and iOS) with two different form factors. And with the additional promise AIR being able deliver Apps two extra Mobile platforms sooner than later. Starting with The Playbook from RIM and potentially following with WebOS later on. You could also wonder why not also counting Adobe AIR for TV’s. And the simple reason for that, because not truly there yet. But just like the case The Playbook, that should soon change.
Take advantage new features iOS like multitasking, retina display for higher screen resolutions 960x640, and front and back camera support. Capture audio with the microphone and build applications with integrated development process when packaging the IPA format.
Conveniently debug your applications Android device through USB connection with Wi-Fi setup required. Android USB drivers for Microsoft® Windows® are now included with the Adobe AIR software development kit (SDK).
Maximize graphics rendering performance for Android and iOS taking advantage the device's graphics hardware acceleration.
Display web links inside application (for example, your Facebook application) quickly access web content without having leave your application. need switch your web browser.
Simplify the development multiscreen applications when soft keyboards automatically appear when required. Desktop applications originally designed for physical keyboards are more easily optimized for mobile devices when you don't have modify the content application display the soft keyboard.
sense what Adobe AIR 2.6 brings now, Adobe that shows they are playing win bringing their best RIA game into fruition, many screens and platforms they can manage. Making the plight for the RIA dead serious statement why Runtimes and Plugins are here stay and got solid place the future.
But words are not enough, here video showing what AIR 2.6 brings and the potential what Adobe AIR 3.0 could then mean the future.

original text:
Mir Quasem Ali was hanged after being convicted for offences committed during 1971 war with Pakistan.
Mir Quasem Ali, key leader the party, was hanged Saturday after being convicted controversial war crimes tribunal offences committed during the 1971 independence conflict with Pakistan.
"The execution took place 10:35pm (16:35 GMT)," said Anisul Huq, the country's law and justice minister.
Ali had been imprisoned the Kashimpur high security jail Gazipur, some 40km north the capital Dhaka.
Russel Sheikh, senior Gazipur police official, told the AFP news agency that officials took "highest security measures" ahead the execution for fear violence his supporters.
"More than 1,000 police have been deployed the district," Sheikh said.
Talha Ahmad, commentator and lawyer Bangladeshi affairs, told Jazeera that Ali was different from other Jamaat leaders.
"He was celebrated very successful businessman and somebody who has done tremendous amount work create free media and with vulnerable people, especially refugees," Ahmad said.
"He was one the rare breed Jamaat politicians who was able reach out the wider society. seems government goes after anybody who capable mounting intellectual and practical challenge the them. The government has become authoritarian recently that doesn't allow any opposition activism all, whether Jamaat any other party."
The Supreme Court's decision reject Ali's appeal was major blow for the party, which the 63-year-old tycoon had helped revive recent decades.
Five opposition leaders have been executed for war crimes since 2013. Ali was the last prominent leader Jamaat face execution.
The war crimes tribunal set the government has divided the country, with supporters Jamaat and the main opposition Bangladesh Nationalist Party branding sham aimed eliminating their leaders.
Ali was convicted November 2014 series crimes during Bangladesh's war separation from Pakistan, including the abduction and murder young independence fighter.
His son, Mir Ahmed Bin Quasem, who was part his legal defence team, was allegedly abducted security forces earlier August, which critics say was attempt sow fear and prevent protests against the execution.
